body_txt: This is the character who is always trying to be the Ideal Man, usually by being brave , strong, responsible, or chivalrous . He sometimes has some kind of inferiority complex due to an overbearing older sibling or father . He is sometimes heard shouting about being a man at the top of his lungs while posing dramatically on a rock (bonus points for crashing waves or a sunset). Generally on their way to being a badass of some form. Occasionally has an ill younger sister or Keet little brother. Oh, and never mention any childlike or cute attributes he might have. May overlap with Wants to Be Grown Up , if a young boy sees the "Real Man" as the ideal standard he wants to grow up into. Compare with the The Idiot from Osaka , Hot-Blooded , No True Scotsman , and contrast Emo (in any of its forms), often overlaps with Loser Protagonist . Also heavily overlaps with I Just Want to Be Badass given that the concepts of badass and manly are frequently interconnected. A victim of Sissy Shaming might feel this way if they take their critics' words to heart. Not to be confused with I Wanna Be the Guy , which is more Macho Masochism than it is manliness. Or Become a Real Boy , which is not about seeking manliness but humanity.
